summary: Iteration 33 - Frontend UI Testing for ASR Solar Business Enhancements. All 4 requested features VERIFIED: 1) Floating Shop Icon on homepage with 'NEW' badge ✓, 2) Shop page mobile responsive ✓, 3) CRM WhatsApp uses api.whatsapp.com ✓, 4) Product Management tables have overflow-x-auto ✓
critical_code_review_comments: App.js line 1784-1797: Floating shop icon implemented correctly with ShoppingBag icon, amber/orange gradient, animate-pulse, and 'NEW' badge
CRMDashboard.js line 990-996: sendWhatsApp function correctly uses api.whatsapp.com which prioritizes WhatsApp Business app on mobile
ProductManagement.js line 632 and 774: overflow-x-auto added to both Products and Orders table containers for mobile scroll
context_for_next_testing_agent: All frontend enhancements verified. The floating shop icon appears on homepage with NEW badge (amber/orange gradient). Shop page is mobile responsive. CRM WhatsApp uses api.whatsapp.com format. Product/Order tables have horizontal scroll on mobile.

shop_mobile_responsive.products_displayed: Products display in 2-column grid on mobile

crm_whatsapp_business_url.comment: Uses api.whatsapp.com which prioritizes WhatsApp Business app on mobile

ui_tests_performed: Homepage floating shop icon visibility and styling
CRM Leads tab WhatsApp button presence
